title: Native Pi TUI invalid result retry proof
goal: Prove that native Pi TUI worker attempts use the same bounded invalid-output evidence and envelope retry behavior as the wrapper path, without parsing terminal text as a fallback result.
acceptance: Document an adversarial native Pi TUI run or deterministic test where a TUI result artifact exists but its result payload is invalid for the worker result model, producing preserved invalid-output evidence.
Evidence includes the invalid-output artifact path, invalid_worker_output or worker_attempt_failure event, retry disposition, bounded retry count, and final terminal outcome.
Evidence shows terminal text, Herdr scrollback, Herdr metadata, and Pi display state were not parsed as fallback result evidence.
The proof document states what retry behavior proves and does not prove.
must_ask_if: The proof would require weakening submit_worker_result validation in production code.
The proof can only be obtained by reading terminal text as output.
